testcase.name: test_multichip_two_layer_stacked_prefill_layout_perf[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_THROW @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/program/program.cpp:1492: tt::exception info: Statically allocated circular buffers on core range [0-4 - 1-4] grow to 3061248 B which is beyond max L1 size of 1572864 B backtrace: --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/_ttnncpp.so(+0x164e4ca) [0x78fc8664e4ca] --- tt::tt_metal::detail::ProgramImpl::validate_circular_buffer_region(tt::tt_metal::IDevice const*) --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/libtt_metal.so(+0xbc4d73) [0x78fc847c4d73] --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/libtt_metal.so(+0xa6c7e3) [0x78fc8466c7e3] --- /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6(+0xf5c79) [0x78fccae17c79] --- /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6(+0x9caa4) [0x78fccd8d3aa4] --- /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6(__clone+0x44) [0x78fccd960a64]
